summary: NFT minting application with provenance display and wallet transfer functionality, featuring deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill music
architectural_notes: NFT application with minting capability and metadata management

existing_features.title: Replace the existing forge ambient sound system with deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music that plays continuously when the user enables audio via the music toggle button in the header
Update the AmbientSound component to generate or play deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill music instead of the current forge ambient sounds (metal clinks, heat hum, noise)

new_feature_requests.summary: Add functionality to send/transfer NFTs to another wallet address
Implement deep bass cyberpunk Psy chill background music
